[D1] (6:3-7:21) TS377012: This Effect generator contains `try/catch`; in this context, error handling is expressed with Effect APIs such as Effect.try, Effect.tryPromise, Effect.catch, Effect.catchTag). effect(tryCatchInEffectGen)
